title: NLU Delhi, Mentblue launch Certificate Course on Mergers & Acquisitions: Due Diligence and Deal Making - Register Now!
description: India's M&A market has never been more active, and the gap between knowing transaction law and practising it has never mattered more. From structuring a term sheet and running legal due diligence, to negotiating an SPA, securing regulatory clearances and closing a cross-border deal, law firms no longer pay for learning curves. Day-one readiness is expected.India's best law schools teach the law brilliantly. Nobody was teaching the deal.To close that gap, National Law University, Delhi (NLU D
